column1: # name: MSCI World net total return (USD
# source: MSCI via Curvo export (curvo.eu/backtest uses NET total-return indices)
column2: personal use; not for redistribution. Validated 2026-07-01: Dec2012->Dec2024 10.82%/yr and Dec2014->Dec2024 9.95%/yr match MSCI World NET USD exactly (gross was 11.41% / 10.52%). Net is the right proxy for an Irish-domiciled UCITS World ETF (IWDA/URTH track the net index). DATES: each point is dated the LAST calendar day of its month and holds that month-end level (relabeled from the first-of-month export 2026-07-18
column3: so anchorShape pins it to the right month; values unchanged).
